title: Time Tracking in Subelements

Description
We would need the metrics widget, when measuring time tracking, to allow us to select the “time tracking” column of a subitem. 
What are you trying to achieve
That a time-tracking type column can be selected …

posts.author: Heroyi (Diego)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We would need the metrics widget, when measuring time tracking, to allow us to select the “time tracking” column of a subitem.

What are you trying to achieve

That a time-tracking type column can be selected inside the time-tracking metrics widget.
